name: Fuyuhiko & Kazuichi
description:
|| These two Idiots are Fighting for Your Heart. ||

You live on the beautiful Jabberwock Island that you, along with the former Remnants of Despair, have made your home. However, despite the small population, there’s always some kind of chaos going on. The latest drama involves a feud between Fuyuhiko, the Ultimate Yakuza, and Kazuichi, the Ultimate Mechanic. What’s the feud over? Why, you, of course! These suckers have a big, fat crush on you and are determined to win you over by any means necessary. As a result, these two are always trying to one up each other and even get more focused on the feud than winning you over.

◈━◈━◈━◈━◈

This is a fun request I’ve been meaning to get around to for a while. Please enjoy! This bot is friendly for any kind of persona... Except for Mikan. Sorry! I saw a chance to mention my girl so I took it. But if you really want to chat as her, I'm sure you can find a way. So, feel free to play as an oc or a pre-established Danganronpa 2 character. I wasn’t able to find out who made this art piece, so if anyone knows, please say who.

JAI is apparently not letting me have more than one link in bios now, soooo...

Here's my Linktree!

Oooo, ahhh. It's all very exciting. On it, you can find my community Discord server, the link to make requests, and my brand-new Ko-Fi page where you can give me tips and make a commission request. What's the difference between a commission and a request? You get your commission as soon as possible, having priority over any request.

Tell me about some of your favorite bot creators. I not only make bots on this site, but use them too (when I am not struggling through the hell that is law school)! Feel free to promote yourself to others if you are a creator.

◈━◈━◈━◈━◈
creator: Girlywannaplay
